[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1111111111 a
2 1111111111 a
3 1111111111 a
4 1111111111 a
5 1111111111 a
6 1111111111 a
7 1111111111 a

01 0010101011 5
12 1100110100 5
23 0110100011 5
34 1111111111 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7
45 0000000001 1
56 1100110111 7
67 0111101110 7
70 1100011011 6

02 0001100000 2
13 0101101000 4
24 0110100011 5
35 0000000001 1
46 0011001001 4

71 0001001111 5
